sentences.english: Hi, I wanted to talk to you about my lease renewal.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요, 임대 계약 갱신에 대해 이야기하고 싶어요.

sentences.english: Sure, your current lease ends next month, right?
sentences.korean: 네, 현재 임대가 다음 달에 끝나죠?

sentences.english: Yes, and I'd like to stay, but I noticed the new rent is fifteen percent higher.
sentences.korean: 네, 계속 있고 싶은데 새 임대료가 15% 오른 것을 봤어요.

sentences.english: I understand your concern, but property taxes have gone up and maintenance costs have increased significantly.
sentences.korean: 우려를 이해하지만 재산세가 올랐고 유지비도 상당히 증가했어요.

sentences.english: Is there any room for negotiation?
I've been a good tenant for three years — always paid on time and kept the place in great condition.
sentences.korean: 3년간 좋은 세입자였어요 — 항상 제때 납부하고 집을 잘 관리했고요.

sentences.english: You're right, you've been an excellent tenant.
How about we meet in the middle — a ten percent increase instead of fifteen?
sentences.korean: 중간을 취하는 건 어떨까요 — 15% 대신 10% 인상이요?
